Authority doc gained brand assessment, etymology, qualified WfOS Takogami guidance, formal legal-clearance note, and rejected-shorthand collision table (tako/tko/kmi/tgi/kami/tagi/tkg*). decisions: Canonical CLI is the full product command takogami; no published short alias.
Rejected tako/tko/kmi/tgi/kami/tagi and related abbreviations for existing developer CLI/package/infrastructure collisions.
Rewrite-all historical prose and session JSON to Takogami rather than retaining an intermediate brand layer.
Keep archetype IDs, Tendril vocabulary, and integrations/ path stable across the brand change.
blockers: ontarch:secrets-scan detect mode still reports pre-existing age-secret-key in git history (commit a3a4978) â€” unchanged from prior maintenance session.
token_note: One brand+CLI migration before E09.S1 avoids wiring the wrong executable and package ids into the first crate scaffolding.
